videos.headline: CJ Bailey sneaks into the end zone for NC State
videos.description: CJ Bailey runs for 1 yard into the end zone to get NC State on the board first vs. Northern Illinois.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (CJ Bailey sneaks into the end zone for NC State) 2024/09/28 ESHEET
